title: Service Efficiency Simulation
description: Monte Carlo simulation of customer arrival and service processes using Poisson and Normal distributions, with Taguchi Loss Function analysis to evaluate financial inefficiencies in wait time and idle time.

title: Numerical Method Solver
description: Julia-based numerical analysis toolkit implementing Euler, Adams–Bashforth/Moulton Predictor–Corrector methods, and a full Finite Element Method (FEM) framework for solving boundary value problems with error norms and log–log convergence plots.

title: Predicting Student Final Grades
description: Predicting student final grades in Math and Portuguese using regression, classification, and ensemble machine learning models. Includes full R code, EDA, model selection, and RMSE comparison.
